title: Cobblemon E. Eevee
description: Added a cute Eevee wearing a strawberry hair accessory into Cobblemon
body:
## INTRODUCTION
**Added a cute Eevee wearing a strawberry hair accessory into Cobblemon**
![E. Eevee Bare Bones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MfLuJ5q7/images/448a814dc982bb396b92ae199f0ab1d5476ef24d.png)

![E. Eevee Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MfLuJ5q7/images/0b1b7afbbd585a189242ec33c0f86fb473138675.png)

You can directly evolve normal Eevee into E. Eevee

## INSTALLATION
Please put the .zip file in the **resourcepacks** folder and your world's **datapacks** folder.
